title: generate problems with non-zero min index array

features.name: 2D array with non-zero lower bound on first dimension
features.description: Code should include a two-dimensional unpacked array where the first dimension has a non-zero lower bound (e.g., [SIZE:1] instead of [SIZE-1:0])

features.name: generate loop accessing adjacent array elements
features.description: Code should include a generate loop with a genvar iterating over an array's index range, where the loop body accesses both delay[i] and delay[i-1] causing adjacent element assignments
